title: Organic Cotton Bath Faucet Filter by Santevia – Sensitive Skin Bathtub Water Purifier with Nourishing Minerals for Hair & Skin – Chlorine Filter | Made in Canada

feature_bullets: 【A BATH FILTER THAT NOURISHES AND CLEANSES YOUR SKIN】The Santevia Bath Faucet Filter is carefully crafted to give you the gentle nourishment of mineralized water for healthier skin. With the help of healthy minerals, Santevia’s Bath Filter naturally combats diaper rash, eczema or dry and itchy skin.

【RIDDING YOUR BATHS OF CHLORINE】Bathing in chlorinated tap water can irritate sensitive skin. Our bath water filter system filters up to 99% of chlorine, making it the ideal bath companion for babies and adults alike.

【EASY TO USE AND MADE WITH ORGANIC COTTON】Simply hang the filter over your bathtub faucet, let the water run through, and enjoy. This bath tub filter also features a child-friendly organic cotton material, ensuring perfect bath water filtration.

【DISCOVER THE SANTEVIA DIFFERENCE!】Our bath filter for tub faucets is designed to help you get the most out of every bath. After filtration, simply add soothing bath oils or perfumes to your water for the perfect bathing experience.
【PROUDLY MADE IN CANADA】Just like our MINA Alkaline Pitcher and Filters, our Bath Faucet Filter is sustainably made in Vancouver, Canada.

top_reviews.title: Works well
top_reviews.body: This really helps purify the bathwater.  The bathwater feels really soft and clean.

top_reviews.title: Recommended!
top_reviews.body: Love this bath filter, I immediately noticed the difference in my bath water! I will definitely purchase again.

top_reviews.title: Easy to use and it definitely works!
Works Great!
top_reviews.body: I love this as I no longer get the toxic chlorene nor flouride in my bathwater for the times I decide on a bath.  I have the shower filters as well and ever since I'm using them, my skin is no longer dry and I don't smell like a walking chlorinated pool

top_reviews.title: Wanna extra chemical bath ?
top_reviews.body: This product is so strong with a chemical smell I couldn't use it. It doesn't clean out after a soapy wash and vinegar rice!!.  I tried airing it out and it was still full of chemicals which defeats the purpose of cleaning the chemicals out of your bath water. I no longer trust santevia.

top_reviews.title: Great product!
top_reviews.body: The filtered bath water left my skin very soft. Great product!

top_reviews.title: skin feel soft no chlorine smell
top_reviews.body: totally took out the chlorine smell from my water. My skin feels so soft and not as dry. I bought my second one about a month ago love this product. I also have the water jug.

date.raw: Reviewed in the United Kingdom on April 4, 2026

top_reviews.title: Takes contaminants out of water and is affordable.
top_reviews.body: Best bath filter for your tub, easily stays on your faucet with the Velcro straps. Water flows nicely through filter without pouring over the top and takes 100% of the chlorine smell out of my bathwater. Peace of mind for my children, not absorbing harmful chemicals and really affordable.

date.raw: Reviewed in the United States on February 20, 2026

top_reviews.title: Works as Advertised
top_reviews.body: I rarely write reviews, but I felt the need to in this case, as I’ve seen a few negative comments that I’d like to address. Some people use a PPM meter to test the water and claim the filter doesn’t work, but that’s misleading. The filter adds minerals to the water, which naturally increases the PPM reading, this doesn’t mean it’s ineffective.The smell is indeed something that people might find unpleasant, this is likely due to the added minerals. If you've ever had natural mineral water (not store-bought), you’ll recognize the scent. If you don't know what I am talking about, just go to Bad Ems in Germany, and try it :) Btw, the smell faded after 4-5 baths in our case.My only real issue is that the filter doesn’t seem to remove much besides chlorine. However, I have to mention that my child’s eczema completely disappeared within two months of using it.

date.raw: Reviewed in the United Kingdom on February 8, 2025

top_reviews.title: A month later and my toddler’s skin looks almost 90% better
top_reviews.body: One day my toddler’s babysitter sent me a photo, and I noticed a small white patch on the upper part of his cheek. At first it looked tiny, but later I realized it had become more noticeable. That’s when I started thinking that maybe the bath water was too harsh for his sensitive skin.Since we don’t have a whole-house water filter, I began searching for a simple solution and found this Santevia bath faucet filter on Amazon. I loved the design right away — it’s simple, practical, and affordable.After reading the reviews and learning about the story behind why this filter was created, I felt even more confident about trying it. It’s very easy to use and made bath time feel much gentler for my toddler’s skin.As a mom, finding small solutions that support sensitive skin can make a big difference, and this has been a great addition to our bath routine.

date.raw: Reviewed in the United States on March 7, 2026

top_reviews.title: Good product
top_reviews.body: Really like the product. Deducted a star though as they do develop black mould around the outside relatively quickly, so find I have to replace more often than I'd like. But worth it as my children have sensitive skin and our waters very hardUpdate: deducted a further star as my last one hasn't even lasted a month before developing black mould. Seems expensive for something that needs replacing so frequently. Although it's very good at filtering!

date.raw: Reviewed in the United Kingdom on March 9, 2025

faqs.title: What do we do?
faqs.body: Santevia, a proud Canadian Company, offers water filters that enhance taste and health, perfect for both home and on-the-go use.

faqs.title: How are we unique?
faqs.body: Ordinary water filters remove essential minerals that your body needs. Santevia creates healthy water by adding back minerals like calcium and magnesium to support your optimal health.

faqs.title: How did we start?
faqs.body: The first Santevia product was developed to help combat co-founder David Anderson’s chronic acid reflux. Since drinking Santevia water and improving his diet, David no longer suffers from chronic acid reflux.

a_plus_content.company_description_text: Santevia Gives Back We believe clean drinking water is a right that is sadly not available to all. We’re on a mission to change this. Every MINA Alkaline Pitcher and Gravity Water System sold gives 100 days of clean drinking water to communities in Uganda living in water poverty. Our giving goal: 100,000 years of clean drinking water by 2030. Total Dissolved Solids Total Dissolved Solids (TDS) is a commonly misunderstood unit of measurement. Whenever TDS is measured in a body of water, that reading not only includes contaminants, but also healthy materials that should be in your drinking water, such as calcium and magnesium. Drinking water with 0 TDS is actually unhealthy, since this means that your water has none of the essential minerals that your body needs.
